# Roving

> The neobank for AI agents and the agentic economy. Roving gives every AI agent a real bank account, virtual cards, spending rules, global payments, and a verified financial identity.

Roving is built by Calen Financial Technologies Ltd, headquartered in London, UK.

## What Roving does

Roving provides financial infrastructure specifically designed for AI agents and the businesses that deploy them. It enables AI agents to hold funds, make payments, and operate financially — with human-controlled rules, approvals, and full audit trails at every step.

## Core products

- **Agent Bank Accounts** — Dedicated wallets, accounts and controls for AI agents operating across borders, platforms and payment rails.
- **Virtual Cards** — Issue virtual cards per agent with spend limits, merchant restrictions, and real-time approval rules built in.
- **Global Payments** — Let agents pay APIs, vendors and services internationally while owners control limits, rules and permissions.
- **KYA (Know Your Agent)** — Identity verification layer for AI agents. Verifies ownership, purpose, connected tools, financial permissions, and risk profile before an agent is granted financial access.
- **Phoebe AI** — Natural language interface for initiating payments and banking tasks via voice or text commands.
- **API & Sandbox** — Full REST API with sandbox environment for developers to test agent payment flows before going live.

## Key use cases

- Agentic banking — giving AI agents accounts and cards with built-in controls
- Invoice discovery, validation and payment automation
- Subscription and SaaS payment management for AI workflows
- Travel agent booking within spending policies
- Procurement automation with human approval gates
- Treasury and budget allocation across agents and currencies
- AI commerce — autonomous systems transacting across APIs and marketplaces
- Compliance and audit trail generation for every agent transaction

## How Roving compares

Unlike general payment processors or wallets, Roving is purpose-built for the agent layer:
- Dedicated accounts, wallets and cards per individual agent (not shared balances)
- Owner-defined approval rules enforced before money moves
- Full execution trace for every transaction — not just payment status
- KYA identity verification specific to AI agents
- Personal, team and enterprise deployment modes
- Multi-currency and multi-rail roadmap

## Who it's for

- AI startups building autonomous products
- Agent builders and developers using OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen or MCP-based stacks
- Enterprises deploying AI agents for finance, procurement or operations
- Finance teams managing agent-initiated spend
- Developers building agentic workflows that require payments

- **Company**: Calen Financial Technologies Ltd
